calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEATHER STOLTZ, JACK MURRAY, KELLEY BRODERICK, STEVE SPEARS, FRANCISCAN PROPERTIES, INC. D/B/A BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY HOMESERVICES MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendants' Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter:Giselle Casey, CSR#8098, casey.giselle@gmail.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEATHER STOLTZ, JACK MURRAY, KELLEY BRODERICK, STEVE SPEARS, FRANCISCAN PROPERTIES, INC. D/B/A BERKESHIRE HATHAWAY HOMESERVICES DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter:Giselle Casey, CSR#8098, casey.giselle@gmail.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
